title: Kraken parent Payward to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap for $600m
snippet: Payward, the parent of cryptocurrency exchange Kraken, has agreed to acquire Hong Kong based Reap Technologies for up to $600 million in cash and stock. Reap is a stablecoin-native payments infrastructure company whose API enables corporate card issuance, cross border payouts and treasury management

title: JPMorgan, Mastercard make first cross-border US Treasury transfer via XRP Ledger
snippet: The cross-border tokenized US Treasury transaction using blockchain and banking rails builds on an earlier pilot in which the same fund moved between a public and permissioned blockchain.

title: Kraken Parent Acquires Asian Stablecoin Firm Reap for $600 Million: Bloomberg
snippet: The deal marks Kraken's largest acquisition as it pushes into Asian cross-border payments through stablecoin infrastructure.

title: Kraken parent Payward to acquire Hong Kong stablecoin firm Reap for $600 million
snippet: Kraken parent Payward agreed to buy Hong Kong stablecoin payments firm Reap Technologies for $600 million in another acquisition.

title: Morning Minute: Morgan Stanley Is Coming for Coinbase
snippet: Morgan Stanley just launched crypto trading on ETrade, while the White House wants the Clarity Act signed by July 4.

title: Mysten Labs’ Abiodun says Sui processed over $1 trillion in stablecoin volume since August as it eyes free, private payments
snippet: Sui processed over $1 trillion in stablecoin volume since August as Mysten Labs' Abiodun eyes a zero-fee and private payments rollout.

title: Pantera says $321 billion tokenization market remains in ‘newspaper-on-a-website’ phase despite 60% growth
snippet: Pantera said that the $321 billion tokenization market is still in a "newspaper-on-a-website" phase, with 77.6% of assets still just wrappers.

Stablecoin adoption to scale on back of big tech firms: Bitwise
snippet: Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan says projections tipping stablecoins to hit $4 trillion in value by 2030 could happen if major tech firms continue to adopt them.

title: Bittrex Wants Its $24 Million Settlement Back, Now That the SEC Is Pro-Crypto
snippet: Now-shuttered crypto exchange Bittrex settled with the SEC back in 2023 after being accused of offering illegally unregistered securities.

title: Amazon Teams With Coinbase and Stripe to Let AI Agents Pay With Stablecoins
snippet: The new Amazon Web Services system lets AI agents use the USDC stablecoin to pay for APIs, data, and online services.

title: AWS taps Coinbase and Stripe to power USDC payments for AI agents
snippet: In the growing agentic economy, stablecoins are emerging as a key payment rail because of their low cost and programmability.

title: Bithumb enters Vietnam crypto license race with SSI Digital deal
snippet: Bithumb’s tie-up with SSI Digital positions it for Vietnam’s strict crypto exchange pilot as competition for scarce licenses heats up and scrutiny mounts at home.

title: BNY expands crypto custody push in Abu Dhabi
snippet: BNY announced Thursday that it is expanding its crypto custody business to the UAE through partnerships with Finstreet and ADI Foundation.

title: Polygon reduces block time to 1.75 seconds as payments push accelerates
snippet: Polygon delivered its first block time reduction upgrade since genesis, as the network seeks to position for more high-frequency applications such as private stablecoin payments.

title: Kraken co-CEO says tokenized equities won’t ‘open the floodgates’ for institutions overnight
snippet: Sethi noted that most current demand is coming from fintech firms and users in emerging markets rather than large U.S. financial institutions.

title: UAE-regulated stablecoins to develop AED-USD conversion rails for institutional settlement
snippet: The system enables near-instant conversion between UAE dirham and US dollar stablecoins within the country’s regulated payment token regime.
